Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Path of the Stellar Spear]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — The Path of the Stellar Spear consists of blood members of the Jai clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — The Path of the Stellar Spear is a path that features specific Goldsigns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — The Path of the Stellar Spear is a path used by the Jai clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — The Path of the Stellar Spear is a path available to artists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 19''' — The Path of the Stellar Spear has a Goldsign consisting of frozen hair.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — The Path of the Stellar Spear is a path from which a true heir can be raised.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 14''' — The Path of the Stellar Spear is a path associated with shiny metallic hair.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Daishou was enlightened when he visited the birthplace of the Path of the Stellar Spear.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
